name: Breakfast Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil, then cover and reduce heat.
3. Cook for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
This recipe can also be made in a slow cooker. Place all ingredients in the slow cooker and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.
